requirement_topic.en: EMC — Household Refrigerating Appliances (INMETRO conformity + ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14 series)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用制冷器具（INMETRO合格评定 + ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14系列）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用製冷器具（INMETRO合格評定 + ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14系列）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Brazilian market are subject to electromagnetic compatibility requirements assessed within the INMETRO compulsory conformity framework. The applicable Brazilian standards are the ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14 series: ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14-1 (Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission, adopting CISPR 14-1) and ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14-2 (Part 2: Immunity — product family standard, adopting CISPR 14-2). Emission limits cover conducted and radiated disturbances across the supply-frequency range, including brush-type motors, induction motors and the switching electronics of modern inverter-driven compressors. Where the appliance incorporates radio modules (Wi-Fi or Bluetooth for smart-home features), separate ANATEL homologation applies. Unlike the EU self-declaration route, Brazilian conformity for the regulated scope is established through third-party certification by an INMETRO-accredited certification body (OCP) with the certificate held by a Brazil-resident entity (CNPJ).
summary.zh: 投放巴西市场的家用制冷器具须在INMETRO强制合格评定框架内接受电磁兼容评估。适用的巴西标准为ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14系列：ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14-1（电磁兼容——家用器具、电动工具及类似器具的要求——第1部分：发射，采用CISPR 14-1）及ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14-2（第2部分：抗扰度——产品族标准，采用CISPR 14-2）。发射限值涵盖供电频率范围内的传导与辐射骚扰，包括换向器电动机型、感应电动机型及现代变频压缩机的开关电子设备。若器具内置无线模块（用于智能家居的Wi-Fi或蓝牙），须另行进行ANATEL核准。与欧盟自我声明路径不同，巴西法定范围的合格评定须通过INMETRO认可认证机构（OCP）进行第三方认证，且证书须由巴西境内实体（CNPJ）持有。
summary.zht: 投放巴西市場的家用製冷器具須在INMETRO強制合格評定框架內接受電磁相容評估。適用的巴西標準為ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14系列：ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14-1（電磁相容——家用器具、電動工具及類似器具的要求——第1部分：發射，採用CISPR 14-1）及ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14-2（第2部分：抗擾度——產品族標準，採用CISPR 14-2）。發射限值涵蓋供電頻率範圍內的傳導與輻射騷擾，包括換向器電動機型、感應電動機型及現代變頻壓縮機的開關電子設備。若器具內置無線模組（用於智慧家居的Wi-Fi或藍牙），須另行進行ANATEL核准。與歐盟自我聲明路徑不同，巴西法定範圍的合格評定須通過INMETRO認可認證機構（OCP）進行第三方認證，且證書須由巴西境內實體（CNPJ）持有。

standards_or_laws: INMETRO compulsory conformity assessment for household appliances — administered via INMETRO Portarias (Ordinances)
ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (Brazilian adoption of CISPR 14-1)
ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14-2 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (Brazilian adoption of CISPR 14-2)
ABNT NBR IEC 61000-3-2 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (≤ 16 A/phase input) — supplementary where applicable
ANATEL Resolution / Ato de homologação — radiofrequency homologation where wireless connectivity is present

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances (including refrigerators) are primarily governed by GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (Part 2: Immunity — product family standard; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015). For harmonic emissions, GB 17625.1-2022 (mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020) applies. These standards are enforced under the CCC mandatory certification regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. Test reports generated by CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories against GB 4343.1 are not directly accepted as the basis for Brazilian INMETRO certification.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容要求主要依据GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、电动工具和类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗扰度——产品族标准；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）执行。谐波发射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（强制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）适用。上述标准在市场监管总局/认证认可监督管理委员会（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC强制认证制度下执行。CNAS认可的中国实验室依据GB 4343.1出具的检测报告，不被直接接受作为巴西INMETRO认证的依据。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容要求主要依據GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、電動工具和類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗擾度——產品族標準；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）執行。諧波發射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（強制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）適用。上述標準在市場監管總局/認證認可監督管理委員會（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC強制認證制度下執行。CNAS認可的中國實驗室依據GB 4343.1出具的檢測報告，不被直接接受作為巴西INMETRO認證的依據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions ≤ 16 A/phase (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)

gap.en: Because both GB 4343.1-2018 and ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14-1 derive from the CISPR 14-1 base, the technical emission content may be broadly aligned for many refrigerator types. However, several gaps remain: (1) Conformity route — Brazil requires third-party certification by an INMETRO-accredited OCP with factory inspection and ongoing market surveillance, not manufacturer self-declaration; CNAS test reports cannot substitute without acceptance by the Brazilian OCP and re-issuance of an INMETRO certificate. (2) Edition and deviation alignment — the specific ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14-1 edition adopted in Brazil must be confirmed; emission test data must be reconciled to the Brazilian-adopted edition and to 60 Hz supply conditions rather than China's 50 Hz. (3) Inverter compressor models — modern variable-speed inverter compressors may generate additional EMC phenomena; manufacturers should verify their existing test configurations cover the inverter-specific emission requirements of the Brazilian standard. (4) Wireless modules — any Wi-Fi/Bluetooth function triggers separate ANATEL homologation independent of the INMETRO EMC scope.
gap.zh: 由于GB 4343.1-2018与ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14-1均源自CISPR 14-1基础标准，对于多数电冰箱类型其技术发射内容可能大体一致。但仍存在若干差距：（1）合格评定路径——巴西要求由INMETRO认可的OCP进行第三方认证，并实施工厂检查和持续市场监督，而非制造商自我声明；CNAS检测报告未经巴西OCP接受并重新签发INMETRO证书不能替代。（2）版本与偏差对齐——须确认巴西采用的ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14-1具体版本；发射检测数据须按巴西采用版本及60 Hz供电条件（而非中国50 Hz）进行核对。（3）变频压缩机型号——现代变频压缩机可能产生附加电磁兼容现象；制造商应核实其现有检测配置是否涵盖巴西标准对变频专项发射的要求。（4）无线模块——任何Wi-Fi/蓝牙功能均会触发独立于INMETRO电磁兼容范围之外的ANATEL核准。
gap.zht: 由於GB 4343.1-2018與ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14-1均源自CISPR 14-1基礎標準，對於多數電冰箱類型其技術發射內容可能大體一致。但仍存在若干差距：（1）合格評定路徑——巴西要求由INMETRO認可的OCP進行第三方認證，並實施工廠檢查和持續市場監督，而非製造商自我聲明；CNAS檢測報告未經巴西OCP接受並重新簽發INMETRO證書不能替代。（2）版本與偏差對齊——須確認巴西採用的ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14-1具體版本；發射檢測數據須按巴西採用版本及60 Hz供電條件（而非中國50 Hz）進行核對。（3）變頻壓縮機型號——現代變頻壓縮機可能產生附加電磁相容現象；製造商應核實其現有檢測配置是否涵蓋巴西標準對變頻專項發射的要求。（4）無線模組——任何Wi-Fi/藍牙功能均會觸發獨立於INMETRO電磁相容範圍之外的ANATEL核准。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory within INMETRO compulsory certification — EMC assessed to ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14-1 (emission) and CISPR 14-2 (immunity) as part of third-party certification by an accredited OCP; ANATEL homologation additionally mandatory for any wireless module
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) for CCC certification; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended (GB/T); both enforced under CCC regime by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: INMETRO — Instituto Nacional de Metrologia, Qualidade e Tecnologia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC compliance to the ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14 series is assessed within Brazil's INMETRO compulsory certification for household refrigerators. Chinese CCC EMC test data (GB 4343.1-2018) cannot be directly used; certification through an INMETRO-accredited OCP (with factory inspection and a CNPJ certificate holder) and reconciliation to 60 Hz Brazilian supply conditions are required. Inverter-compressor models warrant particular attention, and any wireless module triggers separate ANATEL homologation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 家用电冰箱的电磁兼容合规须依据ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14系列在巴西INMETRO强制认证框架内评估。中国CCC电磁兼容检测数据（GB 4343.1-2018）不能直接使用；须通过INMETRO认可的OCP认证（含工厂检查及CNPJ证书持有人）并按巴西60 Hz供电条件核对。变频压缩机型号尤须关注，任何无线模块均触发独立的ANATEL核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 家用電冰箱的電磁相容合規須依據ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 14系列在巴西INMETRO強制認證框架內評估。中國CCC電磁相容檢測數據（GB 4343.1-2018）不能直接使用；須通過INMETRO認可的OCP認證（含工廠檢查及CNPJ證書持有人）並按巴西60 Hz供電條件核對。變頻壓縮機型號尤須關注，任何無線模組均觸發獨立的ANATEL核准。
